name: Poppyseed & Nut Filling for Hamantaschen
recipeInstructions:
1. Put washed and drained poppy seeds through the finest blade of a food chopper.
2. Mix the chopped poppy seeds with the rest of the ingredients, excluding vanilla.
3. Cook the mixture over slow heat, stirring often, until it thickens.
4. Allow the mixture to cool before adding vanilla extract.
